name: versepilot-live-desktop
description: VersePilot Live desktop app (Electron + React + Node backend)

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:with-mlx: concurrently -k "npm run mlx-stt --prefix backend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dist: npm run setup && npm run build:frontend && electron-builder --mac --dir
scripts.dist:mac: npm run setup && npm run build:frontend && electron-builder --mac dmg
scripts.dist:win: npm run setup && npm run build:frontend && electron-builder --win nsis
